results.title: Lenovo launches new lightweight 14-inch laptop globally with dual SSD slots and 120 Hz display
results.description: Lenovo has quietly launched a new 14-inch laptop globally. A particularly lightweight model, the IdeaPad Slim 5 Ultra 14ILL11 combines up to 32 GB of RAM with dual SSD slots, Arc 140V graphics and a 65 Wh battery into a housing that weighs just over 1 kg.

results.title: EO 14390 raises stakes for enterprise cybersecurity
results.description: Reframing cybercrime as a national security issue, EO 14390 could lead to stronger links between government and the private sector. Find out what it means for enterprise security.

results.title: MSI's new Claw 8 EX AI+ handheld takes on AMD-powered rivals with Intel's Arc G3 Extreme chip
results.description: The Claw 8 EX AI+'s reveal follows Acer's Predator Atlas 8 and the OneXPlayer 3, two other PC handhelds that feature Intel's handheld-focused chip.
